items.title: Amero Hero
items.description: AI design-reference finder hero with animated pixel-grid backgrounds, typewriter prompt, folder stack reveal, and floating reference cards.

items.title: Amind Hero
items.description: Inspired by the mymind website — purely as a creative reference for fellow developers, no affiliation or commercial intent. Features a blurred radial gradient backdrop, white circle overlay, colorful tag bubbles, animated entrance transitions, app store buttons, and an auto-playing product video.

items.title: Brutal Hero
items.description: Minimal brutalist hero with navbar, theme toggle, pixel-style headlines, animated SVG workflow diagram, and mono CTA button.

items.title: Caldera Hero
items.description: Light marketing hero with navbar, clipped dual-panel video mask, Oswald headline, and bottom-right CTA. Uses scoped color tokens and a remote Framer video URL.

items.title: Crnacura Hero
items.description: Editorial menu hero with 3D letter hover reveals, GSAP image previews on menu items, custom cursor, Zepa logo header, and centered body copy on a warm off-white canvas.

items.title: Data Analytics Hero
items.description: Dark hero with gradient glow, grain texture, mask-reveal headline, CTAs, and animated dashboard mockup.

items.title: Drops Hero
items.description: Dark fullscreen hero with GSAP mouse trail — images fall and bounce as the cursor moves. Zepa logo header, centered headline, and ten Cloudinary trail assets.

items.title: Glean Hero
items.description: Light marketing landing hero with scroll nav, mask-style sections, two-column cards, and product lifecycle grid. Uses scoped theme tokens and remote image URLs.

items.title: GLSL Hills Hero
items.description: Animated GLSL hills hero section powered by Three.js shaders.

items.title: Mainframe Hero
items.description: Interactive hero with mouse-scrubbed background video, typewriter headline, pill CTAs, and mobile menu. Includes useTypewriter hook.

items.title: New Hero
items.description: Premium hero section with strong heading, CTA buttons, glow, and framed dashboard mockup.

items.title: Poster Scroll Hero
items.description: Peacock-style infinite 3D poster wall powered by Three.js and live TMDB movie/TV poster data. Scroll or let it auto-drift.

items.title: Slider Hero
items.description: Scroll-driven hero with cinematic card intro, fixed viewport card morph on scroll, hover name tags with breathe zoom, and two-section marketplace layout. Converted from Pallet Ross.

items.title: Vault Hero
items.description: Password-manager marketing hero with background video, framer-motion entrance animations, lucide icons, and mobile slide-out menu.

items.title: Vercel Hero
items.description: Dark 3D grid hero with react-three-fiber: animated boxes on an infinite grid and centered CTA copy.

items.title: Zoom Hero
items.description: Light fullscreen hero with GSAP ScrollSmoother and ScrollTrigger — layered mask zoom on scroll, split heading, and ten thumbnail images that fly off into depth.

items.title: Cohort Navbar
items.description: Light navbar with Zepa logo, text-scramble hover on links, products mega-menu with alternating Cloudinary thumbnails, mobile accordion submenu, and hash placeholder routes.

items.title: Curved Navbar
items.description: Dark glassy pill-shaped navbar with a smooth framer-motion sliding active indicator, logo with diamond icon, and subtle backdrop blur.

items.title: Supaste Navbar
items.description: Dark frosted-glass navbar with an app icon, brand name, centered nav links, and an Apple-style Download CTA — inspired by Supaste.com.

items.title: Updated Navbar
items.description: Dark pill navbar with a white icon circle, centered nav links, and a white email CTA pill — on a clean white hero layout.

items.title: Blur Unicorn
items.description: Cinematic WebGL scene built with Unicorn Studio — soft blur aesthetic with botanical visuals, slow fade-in text overlays, and a full-bleed immersive layout.

items.title: Cat Unicorn
items.description: Music-driven WebGL hero featuring a 3D cat with animated EQ bars, scanlines, a live audio ticker, and a glass-shimmer headline. Autoplay background track with toggle control.

items.title: Cube Unicorn
items.description: 3D cube WebGL scene built with Unicorn Studio — animated cube with dynamic lighting and a centered text overlay.

items.title: Dove Unicorn
items.description: Gallery-white hover-reveal hero — a porcelain dove relief hides under a blank canvas until the cursor brushes it back into view. Museum-label typography, serif italic accents, and a hairline passe-partout frame.

items.title: Earth Unicorn
items.description: Surveillance-themed WebGL hero with a rotating 3D earth, global tracking aesthetic, and editorial typography.

items.title: Glass Unicorn
items.description: Glass morphism WebGL hero built with Unicorn Studio — fluid glass distortion with motion blur effects. Zepa logo top-left, large MOTION DESIGN text bottom-right.

items.title: Hand Unicorn
items.description: 3D marble hand WebGL scene built with Unicorn Studio — gradient-mapped dither animation with mouse trail effects and a centered text overlay.

items.title: Plane Unicorn
items.description: 3D interactive aircraft hero built with Unicorn Studio — cursor-tracked Airbus A380 against a deep space backdrop with red light trail, animated telemetry ticker, and SKYWINKS editorial branding.

items.title: Ramp Unicorn
items.description: Dithered WebGL background from Unicorn Studio with a cycling text hero — four Zepa taglines blur-transition every 4s over a blue-gradient dither scene.

items.title: Reveal Unicorn
items.description: Cinematic Spartan hover-reveal hero — move the cursor over the warrior and a bronze helmet materializes around his head. WebGL scene with battle-etching backdrop, editorial overlays, and a war-drum aesthetic.

items.title: Rigel Unicorn
items.description: Rigel-inspired WebGL scene built with Unicorn Studio — animated dithered background with layered effects and a centered Zepa text overlay.

items.title: Ring Unicorn
items.description: Deep-space WebGL hero built with Unicorn Studio — glowing ring or portal structure with pulse animation and dark editorial overlay.

items.title: Tree Unicorn
items.description: Editorial nature WebGL hero built with Unicorn Studio — ancient oak tree with a neon pixel mouse-reveal effect. Awwwards-style layout with specimen annotation panel.

items.title: Void Unicorn
items.description: Deep-space WebGL scene built with Unicorn Studio — dual 3D models with wisps, bloom, vignette, and mouse trail effects. Text overlays fade in after the sphere appear animation completes.

items.title: Walking Unicorn
items.description: Architectural WebGL hero shot from below a glass floor — silhouettes walk above you through frosted glass. POV perspective with editorial overlay and luxury elevation branding.
